title: City Performance Early Warning Dashboard
problem_statement: We don't know which city is underperforming until it's too late to take corrective action
objective: Monitor daily revenue by city to catch performance drops early and enable timely intervention
audience: Sales managers responsible for regional/city performance
metrics: Revenue breakdown by category per city
action_items: Investigate root causes in underperforming cities
Reallocate sales resources and budgets to optimize performance
Contact city teams for immediate corrective actions
